text: 1 RPO and RTO - Summary @ minconnie. © scoen * RPO - How much data (MAX TIME) a business can lose e ... worst case = time between successful backups e ... more frequent backups = more cost = lower RPO * RTO - How long restore time a business can tolerate ¢ ... end to end from identification through to handover ¢ Reduce via .. planning, monitoring, notification, process, spare hardware, training, more efficient systems (virtual or AWS) « Different businesses & systems will have different RPO and RTO values * Aim for Goldilocks ... as close to the TRUE business requirements as possible
